name: SolaFrame Theatre
comment: SolaFrame Theatre : SolaFrame Theatre is a fanless, convection-cooled automated luminaire that prioritizes high quality features, spectral output and silence. When you need an automated lighting product that is audibly invisible and visually impactful, the SolaFrame Theatre is the right choice. With a feature set designed for exquisite projection control and beautiful color rendering, SolaFrame Theatre can quietly steal the scene.
